message:
refactor: consolidate duplicate findBeadsDir to use beads.FindBeadsDir (bd-74w1)

Remove the private findBeadsDir() in cmd/bd/setup.go that duplicated
the canonical beads.FindBeadsDir() from internal/beads. The duplicate
lacked environment variable support, directory tree walking, and
worktree awareness. All callers now use the canonical implementation
with a fallback to ".beads" when the directory is not found.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
